headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell pitching 5.0 innings and 3 strikeouts. The Detroit Tigers outlasted the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, while the Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought 7-6 victory over the Cleveland Guardians.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury. Other notable injuries include Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Chase Dollander of the Colorado Rockies, Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies, Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins, and Francisco Alvarez of the New York Mets.

The Baltimore Orioles have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Other notable roster moves include the Los Angeles Dodgers trading OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants trading C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a come-from-behind victory, outscoring the Pittsburgh Pirates 11-9. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory, pitching 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents 7-6. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Waldron on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-handed pitcher Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. This move adds depth to the Orioles' pitching staff.
